generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. Two anthropomorphic leopard cats (male and female) facing each other across a narrow, glass-clear moonlit stream. They gently toast each other with two ornate golden cups. A Caduceus with a lion head floats above them in the mist. Symmetry, trust, and deep connection. Cool blue-green atmosphere. Full bleed. No borders. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat facial structure, distinct white stripes from nose to forehead, white muzzle, and large white spots behind black ears. Slender and agile feline build. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Two of Cups is the 'Meeting of Souls'—when two usually solitary leopard cats find a rare, profound connection through mutual trust.

meanings.upright: Mutual trust, partnership, attraction, romance, and the balance of dualities in harmony.
meanings.reversed: Disharmony, distrust, or a temporary separation from a partner.

ecology.mapping_note: Two of Cups represents the 'Trust of the Breed'—the rare moment when solitary instincts give way to mating season cooperation.

website.excerpt: A rare and trust-filled meeting at the moonlit stream, where two solitary hearts become one.
website.seo_description: Two of Cups reimagined as a trust-filled meeting between two leopard cats.

meaning.zh: Mutual trust, partnership, attraction, romance, and the balance of dualities in harmony.
meaning.en: Mutual trust, partnership, attraction, romance, and the balance of dualities in harmony.
